query_description: Join customers with orders to show spending by customer
business_context: See total spending per customer including those with no orders

expected_columns.name: TOTAL_SPENDING
expected_columns.description: Sum of all order amounts for this customer

validation_notes: Results ordered by total_spending DESC (highest first)
All 3 customers appear (LEFT JOIN includes all customers)
No NULL values in spending (COALESCE converts NULL to 0)
Totals are sums of all orders per customer
Snowflake stores strings in UPPERCASE by default
